short_context: So with that, I feel shaky and very tired, but have my brain back together enough to know why, and that I can fix it.
full_context:
X-Post from BipolarReddit, because it might help someone here [Trigger warning]

Oh how quickly I fall apart, it was staggering actually how fast it happened this time, but I have an idea as to why.Honestly I should have been more careful.You see a few days ago I went and had a medication refill, no issues really, well so I thought.Admittedly I'm one of those morons that trusts their pharmacy, seriously they never have given me a reason not to, so I should be okay right?Oh how so very wrong... For the last five-six days I've been doing my usual bit, taking my lamictal and effexor at night and my xanax when needed.Issues?I started spiraling, waaaay down hill.To the point of just sleeping sixteen hours yesterday to avoid life.Writing depressed poetry, crying for no real reason, and then to straight up ["I hate my life, its not worth it, I should just die".Pretty extreme switch from my usual stable self which has a cheery optimistic view on life.Here comes the massive Trigger warning bit, so about an hour ago I decided fuck it all, I'm done, headed out to my kitchen grabbed my meds, went to my husbands room and locked the door.With every intention of downing all the medication in those bottles.](/spoiler) Well good news is, I didn't.Why?Because I read the goddamn label on my effexor.. its not my usual dose, in fact its not even half my dose... its the lowest dose that can be prescribed.... Now with that bit of new information, even my severely depressed angry with life brain could put two and two together... realizing I've gone from proper medication to practically placebo level stuff.With that, things get a bit of perspective, I realize how utterly stupid I was about to be..I called my doctor, left her a message (leaving out that bit about going to down meds..) letting her know there was a mix up at the pharmacy and that I will be needing to have the proper dose sent it ASAP.So with that, I feel shaky and very tired, but have my brain back together enough to know why, and that I can fix it.Moral of the story?No matter how much you trust your pharmacy, always double check your meds.Also, if those nasty suicidal thoughts creep in, please ask for help.I wasn't going to and was about to make the worst choice in my existence.Seriously I'm teary and full of guilt now at what I almost did, even knowing now that I was just off my meds.Its frighting knowing how important proper medication is for us.Seriously, just let someone know how your feeling.I'm going to curl up in bed and cuddle my cats.

short_context: Some days I'm not even trying and feel gross and masc.
full_context:
Old men at the thrift store

I (mtf) work at a thrift store, and we have every type of person come through our doors.

My job is to put new items out and chat up the customers.

I'm not super openly trans but I am very femme passing or appearing in the face.

I've had multiple old creepy men hit on me thinking I was a "real girl".It happens like every other day.It feels amazing AHHHH.But also.....gross af.Some days I'm not even trying and feel gross and masc.But it still happens.

Sadly Im usually caught off guard and accidentally talk in my lower voice and bleh then I feel gross.

But i also try to keep in mind how fucked up it is that some men think they can do that kinda shit to women.If I didn't get some twisted euphoria from it and also scare them away with my transness, it would be way more uncomfy.

The scariest part personally though is the chasers.They also are fairly common.No euphoria from that.Genuinely scary because they will find reasons to follow me around the store and talk to me.Nothing has ever happened beyond that and I've never had to talk to management about it.But its very unsettling.

short_context: I felt regret and for the first time ever, I feel directionless .
full_context:
Novice starting off

Let's start with my educational background.Through and through I have been a very diligent student.Definitely in the top 5 with fewer efforts.And trust you me, I am one lazy person.Now here's the twist- I got into a good enough college and got a good score in BA (Hons) History, joined a good firm but quit after 8 months.I was majorly a fancy content writer.I became a teacher after that.After about 2 years of being a History teacher, I quit that as well.And here I am.Please bear with me and try not to grill me in the comments.lol.

When

I started working, I had a plan - to go ahead and become a professor of history.Reality set in and I realised, I can't spend so much time and money on it while my parents grow older.Also, to be honest, I got a little bored of studying the same thing over and over.I cleared my NET exam.But, I didn't want to do this anymore.I felt regret and for the first time ever, I feel directionless .Mind you, I plan out the next 5 years of my life easily.But when I realised that maybe just maybe....I don't want to pursue a career in either instructional design or history teaching anymore, boy!was I a trainwreck!

So, I talked to this brother-in-law of mine ( a board director) and I sat down rewrote my plan.I was urged to sit for CAT but it is just not something that interests me.It might be odd coming from someone who used to score so low in maths, lol.But I did some online specialisation courses in finance ( I know how basic they are), but I really enjoy the whole concept and it is like putting together puzzles and I know how crazy and immature this sounds, but I do enjoy finance and want to start afresh.

And surprisingly enough,

I do better at maths-related problems too.So, after a week of wondering about the whole situation, I decided to sign up for CA direct entry and this is when something happened.I am scared.I am scared that this will be another dead-end.Maybe no one would hire me for the articleship, let alone the Big 4.I know if I put in all my efforts, I can clear my CA exam.Sorry if that sounds cocky of me.I guess I am just too stubborn and so end up doing well often,

**TLDR** **ADVICE: Here's where I seek advice from you:**

1.**Should I go for coaching (online) for the inter exam next November?**

2.How do I find good articleship jobs that ensure I can in fact get a job in the Big 4 soon after my articleship ends?

3.What are some of the strategies you followed to do well on the exams if you have a similar background i.e.arts student through and through ( or even if you don't)?

short_context: I do not feel proud at all and I am so disgusted to the fact I even have to write this.
full_context:
I have been abused and in some way it made me an abuser.I want to know if anyone felt the same and can I become better?



I am not sure how to write this, but I’ll just say it.So my parents are brown and they way they raised me was often hitting me.It didn’t really affect me until I saw a presentation in grade 12, that sent me to a nervous breakdown.We were doing presentation in class on social issues and someone had a slide on how kids who were raised in households where there is spousal abuse or parents hit kids there are xy amount of chances they will do the same.That made me really lose my mind and when I confronted my mom to not to hit me again, she hit me.So I will give you a rundown what happened before that day.

​

* I have seen twice my dad hitting my mom.One time when I was in grade 1, chasing her to the washroom with a stick.I didn’t see what happened but I heard spanking sounds and I was too young to realize.My mom wanted to go to the roof that day but some how I managed to talk her out of it.I didn’t know what suicide was back then, but I felt something was wrong.

* Second my parents were fighting intensely, and my mom just made a fist towards my dad and they went back and forth with slapping each other.Worse was my brother was 1 then and they were basically grabbing him as in who owns the ownership of the child.

* My mom often hit me.One time during a parent teacher interview my teacher said something to my mom which she interpreted the wrong way so she hit me the entire weekend.

* I didn’t get an award during my middle school graduation ceremony so she was mad the entire time and even woke me up to hit me.

* She would in several occasions would point a knife towards me in a striking position, which she denies.It took me sometime before I could hold a knife.

* She also bit me once, if not twice, and the scars are still there.

I also want to point out I witnessed a lot of violence from my parents, especially my mom, from growing up.Twice she hit maids in our house.One time she kicked a maid so hard for breaking her favourite vase that the maid broker her leg.Another time she hit a maid who was hired to take care of my baby brother.The maid was younger than me and she messed up the hot water by accident and my mom hit her so hard she started crying.

So all those happened, the best I could remember until the point I confronted my mom.I couldn’t remember everything but I did get hit pretty much often until I was 17.Also whenever my parents fought, they always blamed it on me.Even still to this day.And every time I had to interfere, because in my mind i think of that one time they were hitting each other, I just don’t want to see it, so I had to jntervene.And when I do, I get yelled and told not to do because it’s not my business.And when I tell them how it becomes my business because it affects me mentally, she says I am just making it up and just get over it.Anyways back to the confrontation.And since it wasn’t the best confrontation I just stopped talking to her for awhile.But there were also some more emotional or verbal thing she has said that I can’t actually pin point when or how many times she said that but there was a lot, so I’ll just list them out.

​

* She called me a rapist because she was mad and wanted to degrade me.That really left me in shock because it was right after the breakdown I had and all I would hear in my head for days were those exact two words.

* She one time yelled at me for not talking to her and she yelled from my door “I will cut your penis off, and grill it on the bbq and eat it.” That made me difficulty eating beef for awhile.

* She could call me something very insidious in her language, which I can only define as something like a terrible human being.I just don’t like the sound of it.She also would swear at me that I didn’t like.

* She would say something like.“We know you won’t take care of us, and just throw us on the streets.” Neither myself and my brother likes hearing that but she loves saying that.She recently somewhat stopped with it.

* She would say you are nothing to me or it was a mistake giving birth to you.That hit me hard and added to my suicide even more.I even asked her during an argument why not get an abortion.

* She would also say I am worse than a bug that grows in the garbage or worse than animals on the street.

* She would say something like I will go and sleep with another men just to make me get hurt.I know it shouldn’t but it really does.One time just to prove a point she told me “Do you want me to show you how your dad and I made you on the bed?”

* One time I was just messing with my brother by hitting him in the stomach and he said stopped doing it because if I don’t I might go rape or assault girls outside.Which when I actually confronted her about she also denied and said she had forgotten.She only accepted it once my brother backed it up.

* She would constantly bring up how she is my birth mother and I would never be able to I give birth because I’m a guy and I should be great fun for that.Also the fact that she can hit me or say that because she is my mother and claims how her parents hit her a lot and she didn’t mind that.

Sometimes I did wish would have been better if I just took the beating instead.You know just take it in, because it maybe normal in the culture and just accept it.However, it has made me act up.I never hit anyone because I wanted to or feel powerful, but it came during extreme duress.I will give a run down.It has mostly been towards my mom and usually happens when she starts to berate me or constantly yelling at me.I would ask her to please stop yelling at me or just calm down, but she will double down and will continue to just vent at me no matter what.At that point, I will feel like the walls are closing in on me and I am going back to the time when I would be treated that way and the only way I feel I can get out if I can make her stop screaming so there's been time when I pushed her and in one occasion slapped her because I couldn't just handle it.I also took it out with my dad twice, one time because he was yelling at my mom and I thought he would hit her, so I tapped his shoulder and the other time I grabbed him by his collar.

I do not feel proud at all and I am so disgusted to the fact I even have to write this.I am seeing a therapist for the last 7 months and we are working on this, and the therapist did mention that what has happened to me and how I turned out, even though what I did was not good, but I turned out better than expected.Honestly, I am not sure how to feel when I heard that.I felt a bit good for the fact someone is looking at me and see that i need help and that I am not a monster and I also feel like, why the fuck would you say that to someone who is a monster.All I am asking is do I have hope to be better?Has anyone been in a similar situation?Have you told anyone about this like your friend or your spouse?

short_context: I feel grouchy , irritable and I went on a binge and started throwing all my shit away cause the sight of it was making my skin crawl.
full_context:
I switched medications for ADHD

I was taking Adderall for ADHD…

I’ve been on 60mgs for awhile and well…

My luck finally ran out being able to find it anywhere, there’s some kind of problem with the manufacture that’s been causing a shortage for awhile so no pharmacy has any Adderall or can get any fast enough…

So I got switched medications and today had tried Ritalin and I almost thought it was going to work better cause I was watching a random old Cheech and Chong movie this morning and the colors seemed fantastic and i experienced the sight of color like I never have never before… and was like wow this must be the Ritalin there’s no way I’ve seen color like this before!

Music sounded amazing too and I thought I possibly couldn’t love music any more than I already do.

However, on the downside…

I feel grouchy , irritable and I went on a binge and started throwing all my shit away cause the sight of it was making my skin crawl.

Like even shit I need… truly need, idc I just said fuck it and threw it away.

Even my favorite hoodie…Is currently in the trash…

I then stopped being able to feel most things and my feelings feel like ice… like I have taken a pain pill stimulate…

Idk what to do… this sucks,

I almost feel tempted to started literally punching myself in the face due to some weird frustration I can’t express while being on this drug…

short_context: I feel dissapointed as this has been my experience the entire weekend.
full_context:
Xanax bar?

So on Friday (2 days ago) I paid 7 dollars a pill for 11 yellow xanax bars.

I have a decent amount of experience with xanax, but haven't had any xanax or benzos whatsoever in 4 month before friday.

I been taking anywhere from half a bar to 2 at a time and it's currently Sunday night (I ate one today a work) felt a little somethin something for a bit, but I ate 2 at once about an hour ago and feel relaxed but not "barred out" :/

I feel dissapointed as this has been my experience the entire weekend.I have been on a medicine called trileptal for the past 3 months and stopped taking it 3 days ago when it said it reduces the effects of benzos, could it still be I have enough trileptal in my system to tamper with my xanax experience?

Thought I'd go on reddit and ask the experts..

I feel happy and am worried that it's hypomania.

I feel happy today.I didn't feel happy yesterday because I took a new anxiety medication that made me extremely tired and spaced out, but I did feel happy the day before that.I guess the best way that I can describe my mood is: hopeful.I always told myself that my future would end with me killing myself, but now I feel like there might actually be a future for me that's worth exploring.My concern is that my psychiatrist took me off of my antipsychotic on Wednesday without putting me on a new one, and suddenly I'm feeling happy for the first time in five years.I still take a mood stabilizer, but that's it.

For the past five or so years, I've been depressed.While I had periods of time where I was more functional than others, I was still depressed.I would do the bare minimum of what I needed to do, and then I would lie in bed all day and do nothing.While I did socialize when I had to, I did not enjoy the interactions, and I felt drained afterwards.I was just, you know, depressed.Now I want to see my friends and family.I want to get out of the house and see the people I love.I want to socialize.I haven't felt this way in five years, and it scares me.

I started getting overwhelmed two weeks ago, and I started skipping classes and fell horribly behind in my course work.Finals start tomorrow, and I panicked because there was not enough time to catch up.I went to my psychiatrist, who said I sounded extremely anxious, and she prescribed me a benzodiazepine.I took it for the first time, and when my anxiety melted away, I was *happy*.

I took it again yesterday, even though I didn't feel anxious.I wanted to prevent my anxiety from coming back since I had so much work to do, but in addition to getting rid of my anxiety, it knocked me out.I was in bed most of the day, unable to process my thoughts.I was a zombie.I decided that I wouldn't take it again unless I felt very anxious, and the next time I take it, I'll half the dose to prevent getting knocked out again.

I woke up this morning after sleeping for 13 hours, drank a cup of coffee, and felt pretty normal.Then, I started to feel happy again.You know, just happy!I feel hopeful and calm, and best of all: stable.Not only do I feel motivated enough to get my work done, but I actually *want* to do my work.Of course, the work I do is fun to begin with, but I haven't wanted to do it for weeks!I haven't taken my anxiety meds today, and I don't feel like I need to.I don't really feel overly anxious.I just feel at peace.

I talked to my mom A LOT.We discussed my past traumas, how I coped with them, how I've been depressed for years and how I've been anxious for such a long time.We discussed how I needed therapy, how we both really like my psychiatrist, and how I'm happy.I explained my fear of getting hypomanic, and I admitted that I'm not sure if I'm just happy or if I'm about to go through a cycle.I've never had a euphoric mania or hypomania, so I'm not sure what to look out for.I expressed my concern to her, and we discussed my symptoms and lack thereof.Here's what we've concluded:

- I feel happy, but I don't feel like I'm bursting with euphoria.I mostly just feel content and hopeful.

- I slept last night A LOT.I slept for 13 hours and woke up feeling like I could still sleep if I wanted to.Of course, I had taken my anxiety meds ALONG WITH my sleeping meds the night before, so it doesn't surprise me that I slept so long and so well.

- I don't feel restless or agitated, but I do want to socialize and talk to people.I want to go out and see the people I love the most.They rarely see me in a good mood, so I'm eager to show them what I'm like when I'm not miserable and pessimistic.

- While I do want to get my schoolwork done, I am not setting a million goals that I think are achievable.I just want to finish my one embroidery project for my fiber arts class because I enjoy embroidering.It's therapeutic to me.

- I don't feel overly energetic.I have the same amount of energy as I usually feel, and I actually had to drink a coffee this morning in order to wake myself up.

- I don't want to go out and spend money or sleep around or anything.I have no desire to engage in anything potentially risky.I simply just want to spend time around the people I love because, you know, I love them.

- My thoughts are definitely not racing.They are running at a normal speed, and my amount of focus and concentration feels consistent.I'm just at peace, you know?

- I don't think I can conquer anything and everything, but I feel like I can live a happy and functional life one day if I can find the proper treatment for me.I'm optimistic.I'm hopeful.I'm calm.I feel stable .I'm *happy*!

I don't think this feeling will last long, though.I keep telling myself that I'll probably fall into depression in a few days, that it's not a long-term feeling, but rather a fleeting one.I'm having problems enjoying it though because I'm afraid it's the beginning stages or hypomania.I don't want to go out of control.100% of my manias consist of me being anxious and agitated and just really, really miserable.I don't want to go through that again.

I see my pdoc tomorrow, so I will definitely discuss my thoughts and feelings with her.I just wanted to know what you all think.Is this just happiness, or does it sound like the beginning of a hypomanic episode?

Tired of repressing myself

I’m so tired of being so perfect all the time.I try my best to improve myself for the comfort of others, to help them better understand what I mean.But eventually it turns into “why do you do that” “why did you say that” “why did you respond like that” And it’s starting to feel like it’s just my personality that’s the problem.I have to actively act a certain way, I can never “relax”, otherwise it upsets the people around me.I feel defective .I feel tired.I feel like I want to be alone.I just want to exist without constantly upsetting

someone

short_context: I feel lazy for thinking that, maybe I am.
full_context:
I just need to say something somewhere disconnected from my life.

I have just tested positive for covid for the first time this year, though I was sick with very covid-like symptoms earlier this year when the rest of my family tested positive.Many of the rules are gone where I live, but the problem is that I feel awful, it hurts to breath and I just need to vent about everything that’s taking up space in my mind.

Obligatory mobile user as well as I’m tired and woozy, so I hope this is comprehensible.I also want to say that if it feels like I’m acting I have it terrible, I really don’t and I understand that I am extremely lucky.That being said, I have to talk about everything.

I have been sick so often, I just hate it.I always struggled with horrid allergies (I am allergic to tree pollen and all forms of mold) and my immune system always takes a larger hit than people more average than I am seem to take it.Though I suppose I can’t say for sure.I have had pneumonia a couple times, that sucked, and I had constant migraines since I was six up to three years ago.

At the start of last year, early February if I remember quickly.I was on the toilet for hours in horrid pain.For weeks after that I had stomachs pains.Me and my mother went to the doctor, who ignored it.Multiple tests were done in the following months, nothing came up.When I was admitted to a hospital, I was told that I was lying and that it was something about my mental state.I saw a psychiatrist and they said that my mental state was not affecting my physical health.I finally saw another doctor at the end of July, who found out that it was acid.I was brought to a psychiatrist before a doctor checked for acid.I was feeling healthy after a month of acid medication.This was of course too late, I was better once summer was almost over.I live in Canada, we get two months of summer and 2-3 months of spring depending on the weather.I have not experienced nice weather since the summer of 2020 as the first day we had anything nicer than -10 was Sunday.

That whole situation made me feel really shitty about school.I always had a nasty attendance record due to being sick so often.That year was the best year I had so far.I would like to note that I have always excelled in school, often getting ahead of my peers regardless of my sickness.But seeing nearly half the days absent never felt good, and 2020-2021 ended up my worst year due to the fact I could not come the second half because the pain of my acid was unbearable.My acid is resolved now, I still have attacks from spicy food, stress, or just bad luck but it’s not constant.The acid was not the end of my problems.I had an infected ingrown toenails that October a week after I had to put my cat down after finding out she had heart disease.I missed out on a close family friends funeral because my toenail was ripped out days prior.I was determined for 2022 to be a better year.This is my second covid/horrid cold this year on top of various new problems.

To get out of the subject of my sickness, I’ll talk about those said problems.I just started writing, I’ve been thinking of stories as long as I can remember and was always infatuated with my worlds.I have been working on a draft for 3-4 months depending on the way you look at it.I have 42 thousand words, which I’ve only ever been told is good, but can’t convince myself otherwise.I feel like every moment I don’t spend writing is wasted time, but I procrastinate a lot and sometimes just can’t on top of everything.It feels so stupid, I am young, far too young to feel like I’m wasting my life.When I said school, I don’t mean college, if that puts a perspective out there.I think too much about my future, i feel like I am always thinking about how I can support myself, how I will live and can’t just think about living in the moment I’m in.I suffered panic attacks years ago and the looming shadow of the future has brought them back and they make up for the missed time.

The future brings up another topic.I am looking into my secondary education in journalism (I do want to be a creative writer, but the truth is I have no guarantee’s intention hat market no matter how much I believe in my stories) and I struggle with working out the debt of college.I have been working on some short stories to send to magazines, though none are finished yet.I know how good it is to have some published works under your belt and it could make me some money.But much like creative writing those short stories lack guarantees.And I feel like I have to save every bit of money I earn because I don’t hold a part time job.With schooling and sports and writing taking on something so large as a job seems huge.I feel lazy for thinking that, maybe I am.But I know published stories are better for a future career than retail but the same guarantee is not apparent.The issue of college costs have a slight solution, my father.He lives in a city eight hours away from where I live, and he works for the college.He says if I would be willing, I would have a discount on tuition.

The problem with that is the city, I know it’s strange but hear me out.This was the city I live eleven years of my life in, many incidents occurred that affected me greatly while I was there.I have made my peace with those incidents, I do not believe anyone is after me and I have forgiven my father but I can’t feel comfortable in that city.I stay for two weeks as a vacation and I feel worn out, not to mention I can’t be alone while I’m there, it tears at me too much.

That is that for the future, I have current problems that are stressing me out as well.My family is having some trouble, not in any specific way but just overall.My mother has an infected tooth and her new job is giving her hell for taking days off to figure it out.She also runs a cat rescue and it takes a toll on all of us.People take advantage of her so much and drop of wild cats and refuse to take them back.Her best friend invited the person who stole thousands from us to her baby shower because they were neighbours with her husband.My brother is getting older and is getting crueler as the days go on.I live him and understand that aging does that to kids, but it hurts to hear him argue with everyone about everything.He is always right, never wrong, even when the problem is with some aggression or habits he has.The only situation where we all win is if the argument is ignored.My great uncle freaked out on my mother a month ago, because her post on losing a coupon embarrassed him.We live in a small town where last names mean a lot, I don’t understand it.

My grandfather, he might be the worst.He and my grandmother divorced a couple months ago.It was troubling but not violent.He is not my biological grandfather but I have never met the other man, therefore he is not important.He grew distant and mean as the days went on.We only see him every other eeek, as he works as a trucker.He lives in the basement and used to come up and drink coffee and chat.I adored him as he always kept the mood bright.Now we barely see him when he is home, he almost only talks to us when he had something to complain about.He hasn’t told us goodbye the last three times he came.He told my mother that he only comes to get his laundry done, that feels great.

I have friends, I think at least.I am close to a lot of my classmates as I often help them out with work, crack good jokes, and generally keep a calm and understanding atmosphere.I was a loner the first two years I came but people seemed to gravitate to me when I became more outgoing.Yet I can never shake the feeling that they don’t really like me, I wonder if they just find me helpful to have around.I have never been bullied, by my new peers that is, and I don’t feel like I ever will.I don’t have friends outside if that, not anymore.I never kept in touch with my old classmates, and I only had one other friend outside of that.We chatted for a while even after I moved, but we grew apart.I always wonder if I was at fault for that, if I just pushed her away.It doesn’t matter now, I don’t think I can try to kindle that friendship again, I have trouble keeping in contact with all my family.

I have more things, but I’m not going to talk about them hear.If I need to vent again I will make another post.If you are curious, if anyone reads this, I will answer questions when I wake up.I really do have a good life, we have enough money to eat well, we can afford occasional luxuries and a roof over our heads.I have a safety net for my future, I won’t be kicked out.I tell my problems to my mother, but I feel like I need to tell it to someone, even just an empty void.That and my throat burns, it hurts to breath my nostrils are so enflamed.

TLDR: I’m sick, I’ve been sick so much.I worry so much about my future even though I am yet so young.My family is getting complicated, or I’m at least now old enough to see it all through.I’m scared I don’t really have any friends.

short_context: I don’t know if I should be upset or relieved, I feel manipulated honestly.
full_context:
My (21M) girlfriend’s (20F) (of three years) best friend (20F) dropped me after I broke up with girlfriend.Similar thing happened with my best friend (20M) before.Unsure how to feel.

So this is kind of a can of worms but please bear with me because it’s been one of the most pressing issues I’ve had personally.

A few months ago my girlfriend broke up with me.I confided in my best friend, who was also a good friend in the group of our other friends including my girlfriend.He immediately deleted her on everything and totally dropped her.At the time I thought it was natural, I’ve known him for two years longer than they knew each other and he is my BEST FRIEND so naturally he would ‘side’ with me.(The break up was part of a situation in which I was objectively wronged, my girlfriend admitted this, I’ve since forgiven her)

My girlfriend was very hurt by this which I discovered after we got back together.It caused a number of issues in our relationship and it’s gone unresolved to this day.My friend has since apologized to her through me but nothing has really been fixed and she still dislikes him and he makes no attempt to reach out to her either.The fissure goes so much as to have me basically not allowed to see him and she is visibly upset if she notices me texting him.

So fast forward to a couple weeks ago.I broke up with my girlfriend after an unfortunate week in an incredibly depressive mood and she was just my scapegoat.The regret was almost instantaneous and we got back together the next day.However, I have since not spoken to her best friend and she ghosted me at work a few days after (this is all exceptionally complicated because I work with her and my girlfriend).I haven’t reached out to her and she hasn’t to me, now they talk to my girlfriend in their own group chat without me as opposed to the one I’m included in that was used prior.

I’m very hurt because she INISISTED that I was a very close friend to her and that I was important to her.Context: I have always butted heads with her since I met her.We have conflicting personalities and she makes me very very angry, we share no interests and I really considered her a burden I would have to bear for the prize of being with my wonderful girlfriend.That began to change a bit as we hung out but I always regarded her this way because we argued literally every time we were around each other.My girlfriend got fed up and eventually made me hash it out with her but I’m doing so things got worse because she played major victim card claiming that I was one of her closest friends and she cared for me deeply blah blah blah all bullshit I now realize.So I’ve been trying very hard to feel included and appreciate her as a friend.

So to have my girlfriend insist to me and fight with me over the fact that she was my friend for so long and then have her drop me as though I mean nothing just because I made a mistake in a fit of sadness makes me incredibly upset.Now I’m excluded in our very small group of friends and I’m alienated at work.I hate her and I am now entirely vindicated in never feeling like her friend as she’s now proven I mean nothing to her.I don’t know how to feel now.

I have in the past asked my girlfriend to drop her, drawing parallels between her and my friend that she wants me to drop and she eventually just said ‘Well I am never going to do that so.’ So like that’s out of the question.I don’t know if now I can finagle this ridiculous double life where I go hang out with my best friend and she goes out with hers and she HAS to not have a problem with it since her friend has done the exact same thing to me, except literally worse.Or what, like, logistically I’m baffled and emotionally I couldn’t be more turned around either.I don’t know if I should be upset or relieved, I feel manipulated honestly.

I’ve avoided discussing it properly with my girlfriend after we began to and had a blow out while at my parents for Christmas.We said we would discuss it later but I know it will turn into a yelling match so I’m trying to really collect my thoughts before I initiate the discussion.

Tl;dr lots of context, my best friend dropped my girlfriend after she ended things with meand she got very very upset.I ended things with her and we’re back together again and since her best friend has dropped me in almost the exact same manner and I have no idea how to feel or move forward.

Edit: I realize that hammering home the fact that my girlfriend was in the wrong the first time around really doesn’t sound like I’ve forgiven her.I truly have let the anger fade away and while it used to haunt me I have since truly let it go.I only mention it here to have you understand the perspective my best friend had: she did bad thing to friend, I must not talk to her and take my friends side.
